content:
Pleased to have participated in the seminar “The Girl Who Never Made it to Law School: Barriers Facing Women from Punjab’s Margins” by Ms. Sabah Mistry, organized by PLRC under NLRC in collaboration with WICCI. The session provided valuable insights into the challenges surrounding women’s access to legal education and the legal profession.
